title: About Me
text:
Ali Eren Doğramacı
I am an Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University.
I am interested in data analytics, optimization, and decision-making systems.
Through this website, I will share my work for the EMU430 Data Analytics course.
## Education

Industrial Engineering (Bachelor’s Degree)
